intitule: Drawing and Labeling Your Family Tree

enonce.texte: Draw your own nuclear family tree. Include your mother, father, brothers, and sisters. Label each person with their name and relationship to you.
images: A simple blank family tree template with empty circles and lines, showing where to place mother, father, and children.

questions.texte: Draw and label your family tree.
questions.reponse: This is a drawing task. Students should draw a family tree with circles or boxes labeled: Mother, Father, Brother(s), Sister(s). Each person should have their name written clearly.

sousQuestions.texte: Write the names of your family members.
sousQuestions.reponse: Example: My mother's name is Marie. My father's name is Pierre. My sister's name is Amina.

enonce.texte: Put the words in the correct order to make meaningful sentences about the nuclear family.

questions.texte: Rearrange: brother / name / is / my / Paul / .

enonce.texte: Write a short paragraph (3-4 sentences) presenting your nuclear family. Use the verbs to be and to have. Introduce each family member.
images: A simple illustration of a happy family with a mother, father, two children (a boy and a girl), standing together.

questions.texte: Write a paragraph about your nuclear family.
questions.reponse:
This is a creative writing task. Example response:
"My name is Jean. I have a nuclear family. My mother's name is Marie. She is a teacher. My father's name is Pierre. He is a doctor. I have one sister. Her name is Amina. I love my family."

sousQuestions.reponse: Example: My mother's name is Marie.
Example: My father's name is Pierre.

sousQuestions.texte: Do you have any brothers or sisters?

enonce.texte:
Prepare to introduce your nuclear family to the class. Use the following structure:

Presentation Structure:

  1. Introduce yourself
  2. Say who is in your family
  3. Say each person's name
  4. Say what they do (optional)
  5. Say how many brothers/sisters you have
images: A child standing in front of a classroom, pointing to a family tree drawn on the board, smiling and speaking.

questions.texte: Prepare a 30-second oral presentation about your nuclear family.
questions.reponse:
Example presentation:
"Hello, my name is Amina. I have a nuclear family. My mother's name is Fatima. She is a nurse. My father's name is Ahmed. He is a driver. I have two brothers and one sister. I love my family very much."

enonce.texte:
Read the text below about a boy's family and answer the questions.

My Family

My name is John. I am 11 years old. I have a nuclear family. My mother's name is Sarah. She is a teacher. My father's name is James. He is a farmer. I have one sister. Her name is Mary. She is 8 years old. We are happy together.
images: A simple illustration of a family: a mother, father, a boy (John), and a girl (Mary), smiling together.

questions.texte: What is the name of John's mother?
How many children are in John's family?
questions.reponse: There are two children: John and Mary.

enonce.texte: Answer the following questions about your nuclear family in complete sentences.

questions.reponse: My mother's name is [student's mother's name].
My father's name is [student's father's name].

questions.texte: Do you have any brothers or sisters?
questions.reponse: Yes, I have [number] brother(s) and [number] sister(s). / No, I don't have any brothers or sisters.
My mother is [age] years old. My father is [age] years old.

enonce.texte: Work with a partner. Ask and answer questions about your nuclear families. Then, write a short report about your partner's family.
images: Two children sitting at a desk, one asking questions and the other answering, with papers and pens on the desk.

questions.texte: Ask your partner: What is your mother's name? / What is your father's name? / Do you have any brothers or sisters? / How many?
questions.reponse: This is a speaking activity. Students should ask and answer questions.

sousQuestions.texte: Write a short report about your partner's family (3-4 sentences).
sousQuestions.reponse: This is a writing task. Example: "My partner's name is Jean. He has a nuclear family. His mother's name is Marie. His father's name is Pierre. He has one sister. Her name is Amina."
